text:
Frequency Bowel incontinence frequency. 00 = Very rarely or never has bowel incontinence
01 = Less than once weekly
02 = One to three times weekly
03 = Four to six times weekly
04 = On a daily basis
05 = More often than once daily
NA = NA - Patient has ostomy for bowel elimination
UK = Unknown CHAR 2 x x
M0550_OSTOMY (M0550) Ostomy for Bowel Elimination Ostomy for bowel elimination. 00 = Patient does not have an ostomy for bowel elimination
01 = Patient ostomy was not related to an
